channel.title: LeetCode_解題 on NewPlayer
channel.description: Recent content in LeetCode_解題 on NewPlayer

item.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
item.description: 問題 Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters. 翻譯 給定一個字符串s，找到最長的不含重複字符的子串的長度。 Example 1: Input: s = "abcabcbb" Output: 3 Explanation: The answer is "abc", with the length of 3. Example 2: Input: s = "bbbbb" Output:

item.title: 2. Add Two Numbers
item.description: 問題 You are given two non-empty linked lists representing two non-negative integers. The digits are stored in reverse order, and each of their nodes contains a single digit. Add the two numbers and return the sum as a linked list. You may assume the two numbers do not contain any leading zero, except the number 0 itself. 翻譯 您被給予兩個非空的鏈

item.title: 1. Two Sum
item.description: 問題 Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target. You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice. You can return the answer in any order. 翻譯 給定一個整數數組，返回兩個數字
